top_signals.title: Trucking safety blitzes uncover broad violations in Maryland, Florida, Kentucky and Illinois
top_signals.summary:
Commercial vehicle enforcement agencies are stepping up inspections as regulators focus on unsafe trucks, unqualified drivers and dangerous driving behavior.

The post Trucking safety blitzes uncover broad violations in Maryland, Florida, Kentucky and Illinois appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: BofA Equities Traders Say Buy Momentum Stocks, Eyeing 5% Gain
top_signals.summary: Bank of America Corp.’s trading desk is urging clients to buy US momentum stocks, betting that the group has reached an attractive price level after a bout of profit taking.

top_signals.title: Prologis Wins Segro Backing for Record £14 Billion Takeover
top_signals.summary: Prologis Inc. is set to acquire the UK’s largest landlord Segro Plc after securing the recommendation of its board for an improved £14 billion ($18.7 billion) cash and share offer for the company.
